'''Sliven''' was the adopted [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] father of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Tahiri Veila]]. He was the leader of a Tusken tribe though he was opposed by many in the tribe since he adopted Tahiri, a Human and an outsider.

==Biography==
A [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] [[Gender/Legends|male]],<ref name="JJK:P" /> Sliven was a member of a tribe led by the Tusken-raised [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Darth Krayt|A'Sharad Hett]].<ref name="Barely Tolerable">{{SW|url=news/barely-tolerable-alien-henchmen-of-the-empire-part-2|series=Barely Tolerable: Alien Henchmen of the Empire|text=Part 2|nolive=1}}</ref> Sometime during or after [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="TNEC_AotC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of the [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']] to the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> Sliven learned of the [[Mission to rescue Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|massacre]] of the [[Rrhr hunting band]] and believed that the culprit behind the massacre was the "Demon Outlander,"<ref name="Barely Tolerable" /> when in fact the hunting band's [[Death/Legends|killer]] had been the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]].<ref name="AOTC">{{Film|II}}</ref>

One [[Standard day/Legends|day]], Sliven's companion [[KkH'Oar'Rrhr]]—also known as Hoar—returned after having visited the [[Ben Kenobi's home/Legends|home]] of the Jedi hermit [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and experiencing a vision of a masked [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] wielder upon finding and activating Kenobi's lightsaber. When Hoar told Sliven and the Tusken [[Bordo]] about this vision, the two Tuskens told Hoar that it might have been a vision of the Rrhr clan's killer.<ref name="Barely Tolerable" />

Eventually, Sliven became the leader of his tribe. In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], Sliven was injured badly during a battle between his tribe and a group of smugglers. He was also separated from his tribe and lost his [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]]. Sliven wandered for days across the deserts of Tatooine until he came across the [[Moisture farm/Legends|moisture farm]] of Tahiri's parents [[Tryst Veila|Tryst]] and [[Cassa Veila]]. Despite him being a Tusken Raider, they took him in out of pity and treated his wounds.<ref name="JJK:P" />

As a result of his injuries, it took two months for his wounds to heal. During his time with the [[Veila family|Veilas]], he befriended them particularly with the then three year old Tahiri and learned to both understand and speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]]. When Sliven recovered, he helped Cassa with light chores and even fashioned Tryst his own [[Gaderffii/Legends|gaderffii]] and taught him how to wield it. Due to Tryst being [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], he learned how to use a gaderffii quickly and became proficient with it. It wasn't long before Tryst was better at the gaderffii than Sliven.<ref name="JJK:P" />

However, this was not to last since Sliven's tribe eventually found him. On that fateful morning, Sliven and Tryst were practicing their gaderffiis. Tryst was gaining the upper hand in the duel. However, the Sand people misunderstood the situation, seeing Tryst as an enemy. It was not long before Tryst and Cassa were dead. However, Sliven managed to save Tahiri. Despite the protests of his tribe, particularly [[Vexa]], Sliven adopted Tahiri as his daughter though on the condition that she leave the tribe at the age of nine (when Tusken children were considered members of the tribe) and undergo a dangerous quest in the dangerous deserts of the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]] for a week. If she survived, Sliven would remain the leader of the tribe. However if she failed, Sliven would die.<ref name="JJK:P" />

Thus, Tahiri would spent much of her childhood fully bandaged in sand-colored rags, robes and head covers until she was discovered to be Force-sensitive in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]] by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Tionne Solusar]] during a trip to Tatooine. Sliven allowed Tahiri to attend the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] on the condition that she return after six months to make her decision whether she would return to join her tribe or would remain at the Praxeum and become a Jedi Knight.<ref name="JJK:P" />

When she returned with her newly-found friend [[Anakin Solo]], Sliven revealed the identity of her parents and how they died. He then sent the pair out into the Dune Sea where they survived by using their growing Force abilities including braving thirst and heat, befriending a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] clan, evading a [[Sarlacc/Legends|sarlacc]] and defeating a [[Krayt dragon/Legends|Krayt dragon]]. They arrived at their destination on time, thus allowing Sliven to remain as the head of his tribe.<ref name="JJK:P" /> However, he died shortly after the departure of Tahiri and Anakin.<ref name="Remnant" />
